STARSEEKER: Astroneer Expeditions – Launch Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
Tackle the perils of space in STARSEEKER: Astroneer Expeditions on Nintendo Switch 2: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/starseeker-astroneer-expeditions-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1021-01&utm_id=P1021-01 

The ESS Starseeker has arrived! Grab your crew, explore strange new worlds, and work together to complete objectives before returning safely to the station. 

#NintendoSwitch2 #STARSEEKER #AstroneerExpeditions

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Rise of the Tomb Raider: 20 Year Celebration – Out Now Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
Rise of the Tomb Raider: 20 Year Celebration is out now on Nintendo Switch 2: https://ninten.do/6055v9bQ5 

Our fierce explorer is back to encounter the unknown. Embark on Lara’s most treacherous journey through Siberia to the lost city of Kitezh and unlock the mysteries of the past. 

Rise of the Tomb Raider: 20 Year Celebration includes the base game and all Season Pass content. Explore Croft Manor in the new “Blood Ties,” then defend it against a zombie invasion in “Lara’s Nightmare.” Survive extreme conditions with a friend in the new online Co-op Endurance mode and brave the new “Extreme Survivor” difficulty. 

This edition also features an outfit and weapon inspired by Tomb Raider III, and 5 classic Lara skins. The DLC will challenge you to explore a new tomb that houses an ancient terror in Baba Yaga: The Temple of the Witch, and combat waves of infected predators in Cold Darkness Awakened.  
    
#TombRaider #NintendoSwitch2 

Visit https://ninten.do/6056v9bQg for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s
